case_title: PATEL, GITA vs. BULLARD, JOSEPH D et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, GITA SERVED SEP-24-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BULLARD, JOSEPH D

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, GITA AS TO DEFENDANT BULLARD, JOSEPH D
